title: Dictionary Field Sidebar — Display Table Details as Read-Only
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to see the same field details shown in the dictionary table inside the field sidebar, so that I can review all metadata without leaving the sidebar context.
description:
Adds read-only field detail attributes from the dictionary table into the field sidebar panel. These fields are managed in Salesforce and are therefore non-editable in DataTools Pro.

The 'Metrics Relation' column is hidden from the table for now but planned as a future feature.

The sidebar component is built to be reusable across pages, specifically to support the ERD page (MBT-709) in addition to the dictionary page.
acceptance_criteria: Field sidebar shows the same detail columns as the dictionary table
Sidebar fields are read-only since they are managed in Salesforce
Metrics Relation column is hidden from the table
Sidebar component is reusable across dictionary and ERD pages
ux_changes: Field sidebar displays read-only metadata fields matching the dictionary table. Reusable sidebar component designed for cross-page use.
middleware_changes: Sidebar data endpoint returns the same field attributes shown in the dictionary table.
implementation_notes: Built as a shared component so MBT-709 (ERD page) can reuse the same sidebar. Pre-code review recommended when picked up by a new developer.
comment_summary: Product owner noted a pre-code review should be done with the senior developer before the new developer starts implementation.
